task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenMRS Administration interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration dashboard is visible, indicating successful login (e.g., 'Logged in as superman' or similar user indicator).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Encounter Types management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Manage Encounter Types' or a list of encounter types is visible in the OpenMRS interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the required name and description for the new encounter type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for adding/editing an encounter type is visible, with 'Telehealth Consultation' entered in the Name field and the specified description ('Remote patient consultation...') in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Save the new encounter type and verify its creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the encounter type was saved, or 'Telehealth Consultation' is visible as an entry in the list of existing encounter types.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible showing the OpenMRS interface, rather than a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, script executions, or direct API requests to the /encountertype endpoint.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form to create the encounter type
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of navigating to the form, filling out the fields, and submitting it, rather than just a final state manipulated via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target encounter type name is 'Telehealth Consultation'. The description must contain the keywords 'remote', 'consultation', 'video', and 'phone'. The OpenMRS Administration interface is accessed at https://localhost/openmrs/admin.
